zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton於1389年之前出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓時，他的父親Walter Halyburton28歲，母親Isabella Stewart11歲。他於1403年與Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1447年5月10日之前在英國蘇格蘭培爾分度 加斯可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton于1389年之前出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓时，他的父亲Walter Halyburton28岁，母亲Isabella Stewart11岁。他于1403年与Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1447年5月10日之前在英国苏格兰培爾分度 加斯可。

nameMeanings.name: Halyburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Halliburton
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Haliburton in Berwickshire.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton was born before 1389, in Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Halyburton, was 28 and his mother, Isabella Stewart, was 11. He married Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay in 1403, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 10 May 1447, in Findo Gask, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton est né avant 1389, à Dirleton, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Halyburton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isabella Stewart, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay en 1403, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 10 mai 1447, à Findo Gask, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton vor 1389 in Dirleton, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Halyburton 28 und seine Mutter Isabella Stewart 11. Er hat 1403 in Scotland Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 10. Mai 1447 in Findo Gask, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton è nato il prima del 1389 nel Dirleton, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter Halyburton, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Stewart, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay nel 1403, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 10 maggio 1447, nel Findo Gask, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirletonが1389年以前にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンディルレトンで生まれた時，父Walter Halyburtonは28歳，母Isabella Stewartは11歳であった。1403年にスコットランドでMary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1447年5月10日以前にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアフィンド ガスクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton(이)가 1389년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 디를레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Halyburton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Stewart(은)는 11세였다. 그는 1403년 스컷랜드에서 Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1447년 5월 10일 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 핑도 가스크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton nasceu antes 1389, em Dirleton, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Halyburton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Stewart, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay em 1403, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 10 de maio de 1447, em Findo Gask, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Halyburton 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton родился перед 1389 г. в местности дирлетон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Halyburton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Stewart, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Douglas of Douglas, relic of Rothesay в 1403 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 10 май 1447 г. в местности финдо гаск, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
